nonGoals: Do not change any other functions in tags.ts
Do not alter SSML provider-specific logic or tag definitions
Do not modify isTagSupportedByProvider except indirectly via getTagDef fix
Do not add new tags or remove existing ones
objective: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive and add test coverage for uppercase, mixed-case, lowercase, and nonexistent tag lookups
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, locate the getTagDef function and change the tag-name comparison from t.tag === tagName to t.tag.toLowerCase() === tagName.toLowerCase(). This makes lookups case-insensitive, which also fixes isTagSupportedByProvider() since it calls getTagDef(). Then in apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add test cases covering: getTagDef('PROSODY') returns prosody def, getTagDef('Break') returns break def, getTagDef('emphasis') (already lowercase) still returns emphasis def, getTagDef('nonexistent') returns undefined, and isTagSupportedByProvider('PROSODY', provider) === isTagSupportedByProvider('prosody', provider). Run npm run test to confirm all pass.
